projects.title: Kiau Tech Website
projects.description: A website created for an up and coming company, Kiau Tech. This project required a more abstract take on websites where it was important to include a botanical design. This project is still a work in progress!

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: A personal portfolio website showcasing my projects and skills. Built with modern web technologies and responsive design principles.

projects.title: Clash Royale API Project
projects.description: A project that utilizes the Clash Royale API to fetch and display player statistics and game data. Built with a focus on clean design and user experience.
